item.title: G CLI VI Package Manager Tools v0.2.1.15
item.description:
Product: G CLI VI Package Manager Tools v0.2.1.15
Company: Wiresmith Technology
Release Date: Thu, 02 Jul 2026 12:08:40 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Contains a series of tools for automating VI package manager from the command line including:

*vipBuild - Build a package from a VIPB file.
* vipcApply - Apply a VIPC file.

This requires VI Package Manager Pro in order to have access to the API.

Release Notes: * VIPBuild now returns path VIP file as 'BUILD_OUTPUT=""'
item.dc:creator: Wiresmith Technology

item.title: G CLI LabVIEW Builder v0.2.0.9
item.description:
Product: G CLI LabVIEW Builder v0.2.0.9
Company: Wiresmith Technology
Release Date: Thu, 02 Jul 2026 12:08:30 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Provides a G CLI tool to automate build specifications in LabVIEW

Release Notes: * First Release
item.dc:creator: Wiresmith Technology

item.title: Build Support (System) v1.9.0.33
item.description:
Product: Build Support (System) v1.9.0.33
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Thu, 02 Jul 2026 12:07:30 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Miscellaneous VIs help build applications and packages

Release Notes: [1.9.0]
- fix bug in VIPM Increment Version Patch
- new methods to read and data from VIPB files
- add g-CLI tools for executing project builds without going through VIPM:
- noVIPM_IncrementBuild
- noVIPM_PostBuild
item.dc:creator: Levylab

item.title: Build Support v1.9.0.33
item.description:
Product: Build Support v1.9.0.33
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Thu, 02 Jul 2026 12:07:30 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Miscellaneous VIs help build applications and packages

Release Notes: [1.9.0]
- fix bug in VIPM Increment Version Patch
- new methods to read and data from VIPB files
- add g-CLI tools for executing project builds without going through VIPM:
- noVIPM_IncrementBuild
- noVIPM_PostBuild
item.dc:creator: Levylab

item.title: PPMS Monitor and Control v1.12.2.33
item.description:
Product: PPMS Monitor and Control v1.12.2.33
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Wed, 24 Jun 2026 16:16:32 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Monitor and Control application inheritng from Instrument Framework and SMO
- Log instrument status to the PGSQL database.
- UI and API for controlling magnet field, temperature, and rotator angle (PPMS2 only)

Release Notes: #38 Fix enum/ring management and instantiate ppms child classes

*build 1.12.2.33 allows installation on 64-bit LabVIEW, however you cannot communicate directly to MultiVu from 64-bit LabVIEW.
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Multichannel Lockin v3.5.1.77
item.description:
Product: Multichannel Lockin v3.5.1.77
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Tue, 16 Jun 2026 14:44:38 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Multichannel Lockin for National Instruments' Dynamic Signal Acquisition hardware (4431, 4461, 4462).
- This version is configured to handle multiple cards for simultaneous, synchronized AI/AO.
- The analog outputs can be configured to output sine, square, sawtooth, or triangle functions with (swept) DC offsets.
- Each of the analog inputs can be demodulated at multiple frequencies.

Release Notes: #163: fix issue in which empty results would result in NaN values on front panel
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Multichannel Lockin v3.5.0.76
item.description:
Product: Multichannel Lockin v3.5.0.76
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Fri, 12 Jun 2026 17:53:46 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Multichannel Lockin for National Instruments' Dynamic Signal Acquisition hardware (4431, 4461, 4462).
- This version is configured to handle multiple cards for simultaneous, synchronized AI/AO.
- The analog outputs can be configured to output sine, square, sawtooth, or triangle functions with (swept) DC offsets.
- Each of the analog inputs can be demodulated at multiple frequencies.

Release Notes: #161: low pass filters after demodulation: change to cascaded RC filters, limit n to 1..4, new calculation of f_out, ENBW, etc
#162: Fix bug in output sampling; add Nyquist filter to downsample AI and AO channels; preserve state in decimator to improve behavior when N/M is not an integer
* Input filters: these are retained to allow the user to filter data going to the front panel scope; they are not applied before lockin demodulation.
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Transport v2.4.0.47
item.description:
Product: Transport v2.4.0.47
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Tue, 09 Jun 2026 11:44:54 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: VIs for scripting and performing transport measurments.

[Control Experiment]
- Control Experiment.vi
- provides a uniform way to record information about your sample & device
- record how the lockin is connected to the device
- configure the Krohn Hite amplifier
- set the base path for saving data
- configure peripheral instruments
- APIs for recording sample data, instrument status

[Transport]
Basic transport measurments:
- Lockin vs time (Lockin_time.vi)
- Lockin Sweep Mode (Lockin_sweep.vi)

[Transport Server]
Server used for scripting and performing asynchronous transport measurments.


Release Notes: [2.4.0]
#159 Fix issue where Lockin_time would generate two data files per run (@pgwijesinghe)
#160 add setRefreshTime API command (used by Lockin_time)
item.dc:creator: Levylab

item.title: Transport v2.3.2.46
item.description:
Product: Transport v2.3.2.46
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Tue, 09 Jun 2026 10:58:52 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: VIs for scripting and performing transport measurments.

[Control Experiment]
- Control Experiment.vi
- provides a uniform way to record information about your sample & device
- record how the lockin is connected to the device
- configure the Krohn Hite amplifier
- set the base path for saving data
- configure peripheral instruments
- APIs for recording sample data, instrument status

[Transport]
Basic transport measurments:
- Lockin vs time (Lockin_time.vi)
- Lockin Sweep Mode (Lockin_sweep.vi)

[Transport Server]
Server used for scripting and performing asynchronous transport measurments.


Release Notes: [2.4.0]

[Control Experiment]
- Control Experiment.vi
- provides a uniform way to record information about your sample & device
- record how the lockin is connected to the device
- configure the Krohn Hite amplifier
- set the base path for saving data
- configure peripheral instruments
- APIs for recording sample data, instrument status

[Transport]
Basic transport measurments:
- Lockin vs time (Lockin_time.vi)
